tools.name: list_tabs
tools.description: List open Brave tabs known to the extension.

tools.name: list_windows
tools.description: List Brave browser windows.

tools.name: get_active_tab
tools.description: Return the active tab for the current Brave window.

tools.name: get_tab_info
tools.description: Return detailed information for a Brave tab.

tools.name: get_window_info
tools.description: Return detailed information for a Brave window.

tools.name: open_tab
tools.description: Open a new tab at a URL and optionally activate it.

tools.name: new_window
tools.description: Open a new Brave window and optionally navigate it.

tools.name: close_tab
tools.description: Close an open tab.

tools.name: close_window
tools.description: Close an open Brave window.

tools.name: navigate
tools.description: Navigate an existing tab to a URL.

tools.name: reload_tab
tools.description: Reload a tab and wait for a target readiness state.

tools.name: back
tools.description: Navigate a tab backward in its history.

tools.name: forward
tools.description: Navigate a tab forward in its history.

tools.name: wait_for_navigation
tools.description: Wait for navigation to complete in a Brave tab.

tools.name: switch_to_tab
tools.description: Activate an existing Brave tab by id or by a URL/title match.

tools.name: focus_tab
tools.description: Focus an existing Brave tab by id.

tools.name: set_viewport
tools.description: Resize the containing window to target a viewport size.

tools.name: click
tools.description: Click an element in the page.

tools.name: hover
tools.description: Hover over an element in the page.

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Type text into a focused or selected element.

tools.name: select_option
tools.description: Select an option in a page dropdown element.

tools.name: press_key
tools.description: Press a keyboard key in the page context.

tools.name: wait_for_selector
tools.description: Wait for an element to appear or become visible.

tools.name: get_visible_text
tools.description: Extract visible text from the page or a scoped element.

tools.name: get_dom
tools.description: Extract serialized HTML from the page or a scoped element.

tools.name: query_selector
tools.description: Inspect a single matched element and return useful metadata.

tools.name: query_elements
tools.description: Inspect multiple matched elements and return useful metadata.

tools.name: elements_from_point
tools.description: Return the DOM elements stacked at viewport coordinates.

tools.name: scroll_to
tools.description: Scroll the page to a selector or viewport coordinates.

tools.name: drag_and_drop
tools.description: Drag one page element and drop it onto another element.

tools.name: upload_file
tools.description: Upload one or more in-memory files to a page file input.

tools.name: download_asset
tools.description: Download an asset by URL through the Brave companion.

tools.name: capture_pdf
tools.description: Render the current page as a PDF.

tools.name: capture_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the visible tab viewport.

tools.name: get_console_logs
tools.description: Return captured console logs from a page.

tools.name: network_log
tools.description: Capture a short network activity log from a page.

tools.name: cookie_access
tools.description: Read cookies visible to the extension for a target URL or tab.

tools.name: request_intercept
tools.description: Configure tab-scoped request interception rules.

tools.name: mock_response
tools.description: Configure tab-scoped mocked network responses.

tools.name: throttle_network
tools.description: Apply or clear network throttling for a tab.

tools.name: clear_storage
tools.description: Clear cookies and web storage for a tab origin.

tools.name: session_export
tools.description: Export cookies and web storage for a tab session.

tools.name: set_user_agent
tools.description: Apply or clear a tab-scoped user agent override.

tools.name: emulate_media
tools.description: Apply or clear tab-scoped media emulation.

tools.name: grant_permissions
tools.description: Grant or reset site permissions for a page origin.

tools.name: har_export
tools.description: Capture a HAR-formatted network trace from a page.

tools.name: wait_for_idle
tools.description: Wait for a page to become mutation-idle for a target interval.

tools.name: execute_javascript
tools.description: Execute JavaScript in the tab context and return a serialized result.
